steps.title: Treat the name as essential
steps.content: The sentence refers to the novelist but has not identified which novelist. The name Stephen Graham Jones is essential information, so it should not be separated from novelist by commas.

steps.title: Remove unnecessary punctuation
steps.content: B incorrectly marks the name as nonessential with commas. C creates a sentence break that leaves the first part incomplete. D adds a comma after the full identifying phrase before the infinitive, unnecessarily separating the object from its purpose. The unpunctuated appositive is correct. The answer is A.
